title: lalsgroup.com
description: Lals Group is a large UAE-based family business group operating in retail, FMCG, distribution, home goods, and lifestyle brands across the GCC region. Founded in 1979, the company manages well-known brands and retail chains including Homes r Us, Daiso Japan, Carter’s, Mom Store, and others. Lals Group operates across the UAE, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman, Kuwait, and Saudi Arabia, with activities spanning retail stores, shopping malls, and logistics services. -- 400 gb
